Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
12.17.11 The Ettins of the Channels
Deep within the roots of Frysta, a
race
of two-headed giants lurks. Known as
the
ettins
, the
World
Tree provides nourishment to the mighty creatures,
who
worship the goddess
Gaia
as an extension of their gratitude to Yggdrasil's
bounty
. Exhibiting remarkable woodworking
skill
, on occasion the inhabitants of
the subterranean
city
are known to
sell
their
wares
to outsiders, provided the
intrepid
visitors can navigate the tunnels and the loamy soil trails.
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
